things.name: Palma Cathedral (La Seu)
things.description: Dramatic Gothic cathedral rising above the sea with Gaudi's interior modifications

things.name: Bellver Castle
things.description: Unique circular 14th-century Gothic castle on a hill with panoramic bay views

things.name: Old Town Palma
things.description: Winding medieval streets with Arab baths, Renaissance palaces and tapas bars

things.name: Es Baluard Museum
things.description: Contemporary art museum in a 16th-century bastion with sea views

things.name: Arab Baths
things.description: Remarkably preserved 10th-century Moorish hammam in the old town

things.name: Fundacio Pilar i Joan Miro
things.description: Joan Miro's studio complex preserved as it was when he died, surrounded by his work

things.name: Passeig des Born
things.description: Elegant tree-lined promenade with 16th-century fountain and Art Nouveau mansions

things.name: Parc de la Mar
things.description: Waterfront park with an artificial lake reflecting the cathedral facade

things.name: Palma Aquarium
things.description: Impressive aquarium with Mediterranean and tropical ecosystems

things.name: Mallorcan Villages
things.description: Day trips to Soller, Deia, Valldemossa and Sineu's famous Wednesday market
